# Chapter 2: Energy systems for a planet  (~110 pp)
- 2.1 Global energy demand: history and projection (15) · 2.2 The energy mix: where we are, where we go (15) · 2.3 Decarbonisation pathways (18) · 2.4 Storage at planetary scale (15) · 2.5 Grids: continental and intercontinental (15) · 2.6 Nuclear power and its institutional context (12) · 2.7 Hydrogen, synthetic fuels, alternative carriers (10) · 2.8 Failure section: stranded-asset and just-transition issues (10)

**Archetype**: scaling, balance, ethics. **Project**: model a regional decarbonisation pathway with primary data; compare to published plans. **Exercises**: 25.
